raw_consumer_statement:
Follow-Up to CFPB Complaint XXXX XXXXXXXX I previously filed a complaint about a defective XXXX XXXX '' XXXX  XXXX monitor. I submitted proof that I attempted to return the monitor and that XXXX refused to authorize a return, offering repair only. American Express closed the dispute on the grounds that no return occurred, ignoring the fact that I was never given the opportunity to return the product. 

I submitted a screenshot of XXXX written refusal, along with a timeline and evidence of a failed repair. AMEX closed the dispute without addressing these facts. The monitor is still defective and under warranty. I am not trying to keep both the item and the refund I simply have no authorized way to return it. 

I am requesting that this chargeback be reconsidered and that AMEX be required to properly review the documentation and reverse the charge based on the manufacturers failure to honor warranty obligations.
